Kylong War Dagger  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 22
DMG: 8 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +5
WT: 4.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Lore Item Placeable

Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 22
DMG: 8 Dmg Bonus: 35

Stackable:No

Tribute:60
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 03:43:50
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 688pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 33

Post Comment
price
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2001 at 5:23 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592249282536
1 post
If this cost an average of 500pp why does eqprices.com have it listed as 3.3k???
▲ Page top
RE: price
QuoteReply
# Jan 17 2003 at 6:14 PM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
Don't even trust the prices here. Go to bazaar on your server and you'll be surprised what many formerly uber items are selling for now that the 60 plussers are discarding them to make room for all the new loot they are acquiring in the latest expansions. Find yourself a good loot mob to camp, save up, then go shopping. Why kill yourself to get gear that may only be marginally better than what you have now when you can buy stuff that makes your current setup look sad for next to nothing?
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?
▲ Page top
RE: price
QuoteReply
# Jun 29 2002 at 3:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758067375
11 posts
because EQ pericees is bad and people sometimes put way high prices so that they can sell on server for more, go by what this site says, but not strickly.
allways ask in game befor buying /shout PC on ...
▲ Page top
RE: price
QuoteReply
# Dec 30 2001 at 3:25 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758817131
18 posts
Because the prices on websites are always wrong. do a PC in the selling zone on your server for an acturate price.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 21 2001 at 12:34 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i traded a smoldering brand for one of these tonite and then sold it for 1.5k hehe suckas!
Heh.
QuoteReply
# May 21 2001 at 12:03 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The very first day of Kunark we went here..i was level 35 and we killed the rune lord and he dropped the kylong war dagger...and i was awarded it because well i didnt have anything better then it..It was a great weapon too bad it looked like a ykesha hah! When i quit i gave it back to the guild.

Lortl Thrice
54 Troll Warrior Druzzil Ro
▲ Page top
war dagger
QuoteReply
# May 19 2001 at 1:58 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591749817370
Scholar
397 posts
Basically anyone that can camp strathbone runelord long enough to get this dagger, would have enough resources to twink their warrior with at least a couple cane of the tranquil minimum. I'm not sayin dagger isn't good, just that only a non-twink would use.
▲ Page top
RE: war dagger
QuoteReply
# Sep 28 2001 at 10:53 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765385143
48 posts
Well if you mean by camping solo, I might believe that. I tend to find twinks use what ever junk people can find and can not sell. But seeing as the runelord can be camped with a group of 30-35, I see falsehood in your statment. In no way can I believe a group of 30-35's can get a cane of the tranquil without doing some serious trading and price gouging. I would however like to point out that it does have a nice dmg/dly for practicing piercing skills, so I could see this going on a twink.
▲ Page top
Ogakk Roknoggin
QuoteReply
# Dec 20 2000 at 11:29 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Why in the world does it say average price of 500pp??? It is better than yak, and several other worthy dual wieldable weapons. I think its worth at least a k, if not more. One guy said it was about 1.7kpp. I got my Kylong War Dagger from a trade of: Runic Carver[200pp] Polished Granite Tomahawk[75pp] Brazen Brass Kilij[100pp] and some 2Hand blunt with the stats of 7/30 and an awesome pic 8) [maybe 50 plat?], me also traded 35pp and 200+gold which was weighing me down quite a bit. By my excellent calculations, that adds up to 480pp! I'd say thats quite a deal my friends[thanks Grivinsky, very very much!!!]


Ogakk Roknoggin<Clan Bashemded>of The Rathe
Lvl 24 warrior
▲ Page top
RE: Ogakk Roknoggin
QuoteReply
# Jan 14 2001 at 6:21 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
well yes its better then a yak (for those warriors that use slashing) until the yak starts proc'ing. the reason why its so cheap is most warriors didnt and still dont practice other skills besides 1hs and 2hs (i practice every weapon skill, just for fun).
if you want a quick comparison on price, take the Harpoon of the Depths. its 8/25 (close to 8/22) with 2dex (for procing weapons) and 25hp (for tanks), is usable by all spear-using classes, and runs around 1k. this weapon has better delay and 5 more str (but 2 less dex and 25 less hp) but is warrior only dropping the price quite a bit.

also, if you get one of these with, say, a vliiks dark defender on an iksar warrior you will look like a rogue with the iksar mask :P
